title: AN ACT relating to radon safety.
subject: Boards and Commissions
Hazardous Materials
Licensing
Occupations and Professions
Safety

abstracts.abstract: Amend KRS 309.432 to direct nine members to be appointed to the board; require two members to represent a public health organization; require one member to be a citizen at large that is not associated with or financially interested in the practice of radon measurement, mitigation, or laboratory analysis; amend KRS 309.434 to direct the board to promote the safety of radon measurement, mitigation, and laboratory analysis professionals in the Commonwealth.

actions.description: to Veterans, Military Affairs, & Public Protection (S)
